payload.answer: The new memory may supersede the existing memory: the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Choose approve_supersession if the new statement should replace the old current-job fact, keep_both if both should be retained because there is ambiguity or useful history, reject_new if the new statement is incorrect, or edit if the wording needs correction before saving.
